verdict_reason: Documentation-only change that accurately reflects the new gateway repo, Makefile target and repo counts; sole finding is one stale '5 repo-backed services' count left behind in the Workspace stack section.

todos.issue: Workspace stack section still says '-d/--dev (build the 5 repo-backed services)' but this PR adds the gateway as a 6th repo-backed service and updates the same count to 6 in scripts/stack/lib/flags.sh
todos.fix: Change 'the 5 repo-backed services' to 'the 6 repo-backed services' in the Workspace stack section to match flags.sh and run-stack.sh
